title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Netafim India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Netafim India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Netafim India in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!
